section.title: Services, finished properly.
section.subtitle: Every category below is delivered by a specialist — not a generalist stylist rotating stations.

categories.title: Hair
categories.summary: Cuts, styling, and treatments built around your face shape and hair health.

categories.title: Skin Care
categories.summary: Facials and therapy sessions tailored to Basti's climate and your skin type.

categories.title: Waxing & Threading
categories.summary: Rica and chocolate wax systems with strictly single-use applicators.

categories.title: Nail Care
categories.summary: Manicure, pedicure, and nail art finished to a photograph-ready sheen.

categories.title: Makeup & Styling
categories.summary: HD and airbrush makeup for events, parties, and portrait days.

categories.title: Body & Spa
categories.summary: Relaxation and prep therapies for the days before a big event.

bridal.title: Your wedding day, rehearsed.
bridal.subtitle: Every bridal client gets a dedicated artist, a full trial sitting, and a fixed appointment window — no back-to-back bookings on the day.

packages.name: Signature Bridal
packages.description: HD makeup, hairdo, draping, and a pre-wedding trial sitting.

packages.name: Editorial Bridal
packages.description: Our most-booked package — airbrush finish with two trial sittings.

packages.name: Full Wedding Week
packages.description: Haldi, Mehendi, Sangeet, and Wedding-day looks, fully coordinated.
